site.name: Mathieu Chalès — Portfolio
site.description: Portfolio of Mathieu Chalès, junior fullstack developer based in Paris. Career-switcher from woodworking, graduating from La Capsule. Looking for a full-time role, apprenticeship, or fixed-term contract.

profile.bioIntro: Yesterday I was shaping wood. Today I write code.
profile.bioTagline: Always to build things that serve a purpose.
bioParagraphs: For several years, I worked with wood. Every piece had a use, a constraint, a reason to exist. I've now brought that same approach to code: building things that serve a purpose, that hold up, that can be repaired.

Graduating from La Capsule's fullstack bootcamp in March 2026, I code mainly in TypeScript — React / Next.js for the web, React Native for mobile, Node.js on the server. I'm looking for a full-time role, apprenticeship, or fixed-term contract in the Paris area (hybrid), in a team that takes the time to do things right.

alterago.title: AlterAgo
alterago.description: A mobile app that gamifies daily routines to help seniors stay motivated, through challenges and a progression system. End-of-bootcamp project built in 2 weeks.
alterago.roleDetail: I served as tech lead: authentication setup (JWT), multi-step user profile creation, React Native API integration with Redux, and technical coordination across the team.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.pitch: I'm looking for a full-time role, apprenticeship, or fixed-term contract in the Paris area (hybrid). If you have a junior position, a mission, or just want to chat about a project — drop me a line.
contact.pitchHighlight: full-time role, apprenticeship, or fixed-term contract
